description:
Implement `hx-skeleton` (T2 tier) ŌĆö 4/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Animated placeholder for loading content.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-skeleton/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-skeleton.ts`, `hx-skeleton.styles.ts`, `hx-skeleton.stories.ts`, `hx-skeleton.test.ts`

**Props:** `variant` (`text`|`circle`|`rect`|`button`), `width` (CSS string, default `100%`), `height` (CSS string), `animated` (boolean, default true ŌĆö wave shimmer animation)

**No slots** ŌĆö purely visual placeholder.

**CSS Parts:** `base`

**ARIA:** `role="presentation"` or `aria-hidden="true"` ŌĆö skeletons are decorative. The loading state should be announced by a parent element with `aria-busy="true"` and `aria-label="Loading..."`.

**Animation:** Shimmer wave using CSS gradient animation from left to right. Must respect `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` (disable animation when set).

**Shapes:** 
- `text`: rounded pill, default height matches line-height
- `circle`: perfect circle using `border-radius: 50%`
- `rect`: rectangular block
- `button`: button-shaped with standard border-radius

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests, axe-core zero violations, Storybook with all variants + skeleton page pattern demo, CEM accurate, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-skeleton ŌĆö T2 Skeleton Loading Placeholder
